title: dir-digest output data
description:
The bounded, code-rendered digest of one directory tree.

On a missing/unreadable root the verb FAILS OPEN: ``readable`` is False,
``error`` names the problem, the numbers are zero/empty, and ``render``
states it plainly — never a traceback.

path.description: The resolved root that was digested (absolute).
path.title: Path

cluster.description: The cluster digested over ssh, or null for a local digest.
cluster.title: Cluster

scope.description: Whether the digest was local or remote.
scope.title: Scope

readable.description: Whether the root could be read/probed.
readable.title: Readable

error.description: Fail-open diagnostic when the root is missing/unreadable; else null.
error.title: Error

file_count.description: Number of regular files under the root.
file_count.title: File Count

dir_count.description: Number of subdirectories under the root.
dir_count.title: Dir Count

total_size_bytes.description: Sum of regular-file sizes in bytes under the root.
total_size_bytes.title: Total Size Bytes

newest_requested.description: The `newest` count the caller asked for (echoed for provenance).
newest_requested.title: Newest Requested

newest.description: Up to `newest_requested` entries, newest-mtime first. Always bounded.
newest.title: Newest

histogram.description: Top ~10 extension/name-group buckets, count-descending. Always bounded.
histogram.title: Histogram

marker_scan.description: Whether a marker scan was requested.
marker_scan.title: Marker Scan

marker_counts.description: Per-marker count of lines CONTAINING each known engine marker across *.log/*.err files. Every known marker is present (0 when absent) when marker_scan is true; empty when marker_scan is false or unreadable.
marker_counts.title: Marker Counts

files_scanned_for_markers.description: How many *.log/*.err files the (bounded) marker scan actually read.
files_scanned_for_markers.title: Files Scanned For Markers

render.description: Deterministic markdown digest (bounded numbers only) the caller relays VERBATIM — never re-interpreted into freeform prose.
render.title: Render

DirEntry.description: One tree entry in the bounded ``newest`` list.

relpath.description: Path relative to the digested root.
relpath.title: Relpath

size.description: Size in bytes (st_size; for a dir, the entry's own size).
size.title: Size

mtime.description: Modification time as a POSIX timestamp (epoch seconds).
mtime.title: Mtime

DirEntry.title: DirEntry

HistogramBucket.description: One extension / name-group bucket, count-descending in the result.

name.description: The group key — a lowercased file extension incl. the dot, or '(noext)'.
name.title: Name

count.description: Number of files in this group.
count.title: Count

HistogramBucket.title: HistogramBucket
